message:
test: comprehensive integration tests for session persistence pipeline

Adds session_persistence_tests.rs covering the full capture → persist →
query → cleanup → restore flow across SnapshotEngine, session_pane_state,
session_topology, and agent_correlator modules.

All tests use in-memory or tempfile SQLite — no running WezTerm required.

Test coverage includes:
  - Full pipeline: capture → verify DB state → capture changed state → verify
  - Cleanup: retention_count enforcement with cascade deletes
  - Shutdown: mark_shutdown() sets shutdown_clean flag
  - Deduplication: periodic skips identical state, manual always captures,
    periodic captures again after topology change
  - Error handling: empty pane list returns NoPanes error
  - Topology integration: multi-tab, multi-window, roundtrip serialization,
    empty snapshot, pane_ids/pane_count helpers, PaneNode tree structure
  - Per-pane state: cwd/title persistence, terminal JSON roundtrip,
    agent metadata from title, builder chain, env redaction, size budget
  - Pane matching: cwd-based matching across pane ID reassignment
  - FK cascade: session delete cascades to checkpoints and pane_state
  - Agent correlator: title-based detection, multi-pane tracking
  - Trigger types: startup/manual/event stored with correct checkpoint_type
  - Scale: 50-pane capture stress test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
